messages.content:
The most prominent characteristic of Plato’s State is
1 point
(a) There is specialization of functions
(b) There is no specialization of functions
(c) There is decentralization of functions
(d) There is no decentralization of functions
(a) There is specialization of functions.

Suma Theologica is a famous work by……
1 point
A. plato
B. aristotle
C. nicholo machiavelli
D. st thomas aquinas
D. St. Thomas Aquinas.

.........according to Aquinas has authority to ex- communicate the ruler
1 point
A. church
B. state
C. civil society
D. courts
A. Church.

Four fold classification of laws was given by…………..
1 point
A. st thomas aquinas
B. nicholo machiavelli
C. bentham
D. hegel
A. St. Thomas Aquinas.

By............... Aquinas meant substantially revelation
1 point
A. human law
B. divine law
C. eternal law
D. natural law
B. Divine Law.

With ……….. began modern political philosophy.
1 point
A. aquinas
B. bentham
C. mill
D. machiavelli
D. Machiavelli.

The work ‘Discourse’ is by
1 point
A. machiavelli
B. marx
C. lenin
D. engels
A. Machiavelli.

Who learned the idea of separation of ethics and politics from Aristotle
1 point
A. aquinas
B. marx
C. machiavelli
D. engels
C. Machiavelli.

Machiavelli followed………… method in his political philosophy.
1 point
A. legal
B. historical
C. institutional
D. cultural
B. Historical.

Felicific Calculus’ was the contribution of:
1 point
A. bentham
B. aristotle
C. plato
D. j. s. mill (e) none of these.
A. Bentham.

Greatest happiness of the greatest number is the contribution of ....................
1 point
A. mill
B. green
C. bentham
D. kant
C. Bentham.

Greatest happiness of the greatest number is the contribution of ....................
1 point
A. mill
B. green
C. bentham
D. kant
C. Bentham.

Fragments of Government is written by ................
1 point
A. st thomas aquinas
B. nicholo machiavelli
C. aristotle
D. jeremy bentham
D. Jeremy Bentham.

The book ___________ is written by J.S.Mill.
1 point
A. on liberty
B. two cities
C. city of joy
D. city lights
A. On Liberty.

Subjection of Women is a work by.........................
1 point
A. hegel
B. marx
C. j s mill
D. lenin
C. J.S. Mill.

Which book did Niccolo Machiavelli dedicate to Giulio de’ Medici?
1 point
a) The Mandrake
b) Discourses on Livy
c) Wealth of Nations
d) The Art of War
D) The Art of War.

The Second Treatise of Government” by John Locke made him the father of which theory
1 point
A. Liberty
B. Liberalism
C. Political Philosophy
D. Human Nature
B. Liberalism.

Who was the creator of German Idealism?
1 point
A. Immanuel Kant
B. George Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel
C. Jeans Jacques Rousseau
D. None of these
B. George Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel.

Philosophy of Right (1831) is a work by .................
1 point
A. marx
B. engels
C. lenin
D. hegel
D. Hegel.

The positive theory of liberty was advocated by
1 point
A. js mill
B. aristotle
C. th green
D. plato
A. J.S. Mill.

’Phenomenology’ of mind is a work by...............
1 point
A. hegel
B. green
C. marx
D. hegel
A. Hegel.

T H Green is ......................
1 point
A. an idealist
B. an anarchist
C. utilitarian
D. realist
A. An idealist.

..........favoured the idea of plurality of votes
1 point
A. th green
B. karl marx
C. js mill
D. jeremy bentham
C. J.S. Mill.

Over himself , over his own body and mind the individual is sovereign.”
1 point
A. hobbes
B. green
C. j s mill
D. engels
C. J.S. Mill.
